raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I received a text from CITI credit card regarding a recent transaction. The text inquired about whether or not I made the transaction. I responded no. CITI credit card contacted me right away ( same day of transaction ) and I explained after reviewing my statement online that I did not make that transaction. The transaction was in pending status. They said they would take care of it and submit a fraud claim. I provided additional information and assumed that they would promptly decline the transaction.They subsequently removed the transaction from my XXXX credit card statement but XXXX statement had a reverse charge for the transaction amount. In other words, they found me liable for this transaction amount. I did not receive any notice from. CITI credit card about this transaction being reinstated to my credit card. I did not receive any information about why it was put back on my credit card. I contacted CITI credit card to inquire about why I was responsible for this transaction. They explained that they had a receipt from the vendor with my name, home and email addresses. I explained again that I did not make this transaction and that it shouldve been removed or canceled on the same day it was made when I spoke to CITI. I asked if they could send me the receipt and no response was given, but that she would resubmit the claim. I asked what the transaction was for, and she told me that it was for an event for a XXXX XXXX. I explained that I neither knew him or attended an event at XXXX XXXX XXXX. I further explained that on that day I was at my birthday party at XXXX XXXX. I felt like I wasnt heard and that Im going to be responsible for a transaction that I didnt make. This is very frustrating. I am done with CITI credit card.
